Input.string: ^4=== AG GEAR === -Inf Helmet Nearby Enemies take 9% increased Elemental Damage Nearby Enemies have -12% to Lightning Resistance -Kingmaker Nearby Allies have +50% to Critical Strike Multiplier Nearby allies have culling strike -Legacy of Fury Nearby Enemies are Scorched 50% increased Effect of Scorch -Intimidate gloves Nearby enemies are intimidated
Input.name: customMods

Items.Item: Rarity: RARE Physical Staff Eventuality Rod Crafted: true Prefix: {range:0.113}LocalIncreasedPhysicalDamagePercent7 Prefix: {range:0.5}LocalIncreasedPhysicalDamagePercentAndAccuracyRating5 Prefix: {range:0.94}LocalAddedPhysicalDamageTwoHand7 Suffix: {range:1}LocalIncreasedAttackSpeed8 Suffix: None Suffix: None Quality: 20 Sockets: B-B-B-B-B-B LevelReq: 70 Implicits: 2 {crafted}8% increased Explicit Physical Modifier magnitudes +1 to Maximum Power Charges and Maximum Endurance Charges 207% increased Physical Damage Adds 33 to 60 Physical Damage 27% increased Attack Speed +111 to Accuracy Rating {tags:unveiled_mod,attack,caster,speed,minion}{custom}{range:1}Minions have (34-38)% increased Attack Speed {tags:unveiled_mod,attack,caster,speed,minion}{custom}{range:0.5}Minions have (34-38)% increased Cast Speed {tags:unveiled_mod,damage}{crafted}{range:1}(8-10)% chance to deal Double Damage

Rarity: RARE Armour Helmet Giantslayer Helmet Armour: 1397 ArmourBasePercentile: 1 Searing Exarch Item Eater of Worlds Item Crafted: true Prefix: {range:1}GlobalIncreaseMinionSpellSkillGemLevel2 Prefix: {range:0.5}LocalIncreasedPhysicalDamageReductionRatingPercent5 Prefix: {range:0.5}IncreasedLife7 Suffix: {range:0.93}FireResist5 Suffix: None Suffix: None Quality: 20 Sockets: R-R-R-R LevelReq: 84 Implicits: 2 {tags:physical,elemental,fire}{eater}7% of Physical Damage from Hits taken as Fire Damage {tags:caster,curse}{exarch}13% increased Conductivity Curse Effect 74% increased Armour +107 to maximum Life +2 to Level of all Minion Skill Gems +35% to Fire Resistance {tags:unveiled_mod}{crafted}{range:1}(15-18)% increased Warcry Buff Effect

Rarity: UNIQUE Cloak of Flame Scholar's Robe Energy Shield: 64 EnergyShieldBasePercentile: 1 Variant: Pre 3.19.0 Variant: Current Selected Variant: 2 Quality: 20 Sockets: B-B-B-B-B-B LevelReq: 18 Implicits: 1 {tags:gem}+2 to Level of Socketed Duration Gems {variant:1}{range:0.5}+(30-50)% to Fire Resistance {variant:2}{range:0.5}+(50-75)% to Fire Resistance {variant:1}{range:0.5}(30-50)% increased Ignite Duration on Enemies {variant:2}{range:0.5}(40-75)% increased Ignite Duration on Enemies {variant:1}10% chance to Ignite {variant:1}Reflects 15 Fire Damage to Melee Attackers {variant:2}Reflects 100 Fire Damage to Melee Attackers {variant:1}20% of Physical Damage from Hits taken as Fire Damage {variant:2}40% of Physical Damage taken as Fire Damage Corrupted

Rarity: UNIQUE Defiance of Destiny Paua Amulet Variant: Pre 3.25.0 Variant: Current Selected Variant: 2 LevelReq: 49 Implicits: 2 {crafted}Allocates Death Attunement {tags:mana}{range:0.5}(20-30)% increased Mana Regeneration Rate {tags:life}{range:0.878}+(60-80) to maximum Life {tags:jewellery_resistance}{range:0.5}+(10-40)% to Fire Resistance {tags:jewellery_resistance}{range:0.5}+(10-40)% to Cold Resistance {tags:jewellery_resistance}{range:0.5}+(10-40)% to Lightning Resistance {tags:life}{variant:1}{range:0.5}Gain (25-35)% of Missing Unreserved Life before being Hit by an Enemy {tags:life}{variant:2}{range:1}Gain (10-20)% of Missing Unreserved Life before being Hit by an Enemy

Rarity: RARE Minion Ring Bone Ring Crafted: true Prefix: {range:0.155}MinionDamagePercent5 Prefix: {range:0.549}IncreasedLife5 Prefix: None Suffix: {range:0.085}MinionAttackAndCastSpeed3_ Suffix: {range:0.528}Dexterity7 Suffix: {range:0.067}Intelligence8 LevelReq: 64 Implicits: 1 {tags:elemental,resistance,minion}{range:1}Minions have +(10-15)% to all Elemental Resistances +40 to Dexterity +43 to Intelligence +78 to maximum Life Minions deal 38% increased Damage Minions have 11% increased Attack and Cast Speed

Rarity: RARE Belt CORD Heavy Belt Crafted: true Prefix: {range:0.155}IncreasedLife9 Prefix: None Prefix: None Suffix: {range:0.5}Strength7 Suffix: {range:1}ChaosResist3 Suffix: None LevelReq: 52 Implicits: 1 Allocates Vigour +40 to Strength +132 to maximum Life +20% to Chaos Resistance

Rarity: MAGIC Panicked Divine Life Flask of Alleviation Crafted: true Prefix: {range:0}FlaskInstantRecoveryOnLowLife5__ Suffix: {range:1}FlaskBleedCorruptingBloodImmunity2 Quality: 20 LevelReq: 64 Implicits: 0 11% reduced Amount Recovered Instant Recovery when on Low Life Grants Immunity to Bleeding for 11 seconds if used while Bleeding Grants Immunity to Corrupted Blood for 11 seconds if used while affected by Corrupted Blood

Rarity: MAGIC Flagellant's Granite Flask of the Armadillo Crafted: true Prefix: {range:1}FlaskFullRechargeOnHit5___ Suffix: {range:1}FlaskBuffArmourWhileHealing4 Quality: 20 LevelReq: 67 Implicits: 1 {crafted}Used when Charges reach full Gain 3 Charges when you are Hit by an Enemy 60% increased Armour during Effect

Rarity: MAGIC Flagellant's Basalt Flask of the Cheetah Crafted: true Prefix: {range:1}FlaskFullRechargeOnHit5___ Suffix: {range:1}FlaskBuffMovementSpeedWhileHealing3 Quality: 20 LevelReq: 68 Implicits: 2 {crafted}Used when Charges reach full {tags:flask}Taunts nearby Enemies on use Gain 3 Charges when you are Hit by an Enemy 14% increased Movement Speed during Effect

Rarity: MAGIC Flagellant's Quicksilver Flask of the Owl Crafted: true Prefix: {range:1}FlaskFullRechargeOnHit5___ Suffix: {range:1}FlaskBuffCurseEffect5 Quality: 20 LevelReq: 67 Implicits: 1 {crafted}Used when Charges reach full Gain 3 Charges when you are Hit by an Enemy 65% reduced Effect of Curses on you during Effect

Rarity: MAGIC Flagellant's Jade Flask of the Impala Crafted: true Prefix: {range:1}FlaskFullRechargeOnHit5___ Suffix: {range:1}FlaskBuffEvasionWhileHealing4 Quality: 20 LevelReq: 67 Implicits: 1 {crafted}Used when Charges reach full Gain 3 Charges when you are Hit by an Enemy 60% increased Evasion Rating during Effect

Rarity: UNIQUE Rational Doctrine Cobalt Jewel Implicits: 0 You have Consecrated Ground around you while stationary if Strength is your highest Attribute 25% chance to create Profane Ground on Critical Strike if Intelligence is your highest Attribute Effects of Consecrated Ground you create Linger for 4 seconds Effects of Profane Ground you create Linger for 4 seconds

Rarity: RARE New Item Cobalt Jewel Crafted: true Prefix: {range:1}PercentIncreasedLifeJewel Prefix: {range:0.702}MinionDamageJewel Suffix: {range:1}MaximumFireResistanceJewel Suffix: None LevelReq: 0 Implicits: 0 7% increased maximum Life +2% to maximum Fire Resistance Minions deal 15% increased Damage

Rarity: UNIQUE Lethal Pride [17458; 6.033; Marauder] Timeless Jewel League: Legion Variant: Kaom (Strength of Blood) Variant: Rakiata (Tempered by War) Variant: Akoya (Chainbreaker) Selected Variant: 2 LevelReq: 20 Radius: Large Limited to: 1 Implicits: 0 {variant:1}Commanded leadership over 17458 warriors under Kaom {variant:2}Commanded leadership over 17458 warriors under Rakiata {variant:3}Commanded leadership over 17458 warriors under Akoya Passives in radius are Conquered by the Karui Historic

affected by Haste {variant:37}You gain Onslaught for 4 seconds on Kill while affected by Haste {variant:38}You have Phasing while affected by Haste {variant:39}Unaffected by Temporal Chains while Rarity: RARE New Item Medium Cluster Jewel Crafted: true Prefix: {range:0.5}AfflictionNotableLeadByExample__ Prefix: {range:0.5}AfflictionNotableWarningCall Suffix: None Suffix: None Cluster Jewel Skill: affliction_warcry_buff_effect Cluster Jewel Node Count: 4 LevelReq: 54 Implicits: 3 {crafted}Adds 4 Passive Skills {crafted}1 Added Passive Skill is a Jewel Socket {crafted}Added Small Passive Skills grant: Exerted Attacks deal 20% increased Damage 1 Added Passive Skill is Lead By Example 1 Added Passive Skill is Warning Call

Rarity: RARE New Item Large Cluster Jewel Crafted: true Prefix: {range:0.5}AfflictionJewelSmallPassivesHaveIncreasedEffect2 Prefix: {range:0.5}AfflictionJewelSmallPassivesGrantLife3 Suffix: {range:0.5}AfflictionJewelSmallPassivesGrantMinionAttackAndCastSpeed3 Suffix: {range:0.5}AfflictionJewelSmallPassivesGrantChaosRes3 Cluster Jewel Skill: affliction_minion_damage Cluster Jewel Node Count: 12 LevelReq: 67 Implicits: 3 {crafted}Adds 12 Passive Skills {crafted}2 Added Passive Skills are Jewel Sockets {crafted}Added Small Passive Skills grant: Minions deal 10% increased Damage Added Small Passive Skills also grant: +5% to Chaos Resistance Added Small Passive Skills also grant: +9 to Maximum Life Added Small Passive Skills also grant: Minions have 3% increased Attack and Cast Speed Added Small Passive Skills have 35% increased Effect
